overview: I built a conversational intake copilot replacing feature request forms with an adaptive AI interview, feeding a PM review queue.

keyPoints.title: 94% ground truth extraction accuracy across 3 personas
Two-gate design splits stakeholder UX from PM quality control
Two-call split fixed model skipping natural language for tool calls
Claude misclassified feature type in 1 of 3 cases
Conversations handle bad input; pipelines fail on it
